messages.text: Hey! How can I help you get started with OnePromise AI Training? If you give me your email and a quick note on what you’re looking to learn, I’ll pass it on to the team so they can reach out.

Hi there! I just wanted to check in and see if you had a chance to think about how the OnePromise AI Training Course could help you build and apply AI skills. Whether you’re looking for the self‑paced Starter ($149) or the full Team package (up to 10 seats), you’ll find modules, hands‑on notebooks, projects, and live Q&A at every tier. Let me know if you have any questions or need help deciding which option fits you best!
